message:
fix(matrix): reclassify pthread internals and __syslog_chk as GlibcCallThrough

Correct support_matrix.json status for 7 glibc-internal symbols that are
thin wrappers delegating to the real glibc implementation rather than
fully reimplemented:

- __syslog_chk: fortify wrapper, delegates to underlying syslog
- __pthread_cleanup_routine: cleanup handler dispatch
- __pthread_register_cancel / __pthread_register_cancel_defer: cancel registration
- __pthread_unregister_cancel / __pthread_unregister_cancel_restore: cancel teardown
- __pthread_unwind_next: unwinding machinery

These were incorrectly marked "Implemented" when they actually use
dlsym-based call-through to the native glibc implementation.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
